# NetLoc8 JavaScript SDK

> IP geolocation SDK for JavaScript, React, and Next.js. Detect visitor country, city, timezone, coordinates, ASN, and EU membership.

## Packages

- [@netloc8/core](https://github.com/netloc8/netloc8-js/tree/main/packages/core): API client for any JavaScript runtime (Node.js, Bun, Deno, Cloudflare Workers, browser)
- [@netloc8/react](https://github.com/netloc8/netloc8-js/tree/main/packages/react): React Provider, useGeo() hook, and GeoGate component for conditional rendering by location
- [@netloc8/nextjs](https://github.com/netloc8/netloc8-js/tree/main/packages/nextjs): Next.js server-side proxy, getGeo() for Server Components, locale-based redirects

## Documentation

- [Core README](https://github.com/netloc8/netloc8-js/blob/main/packages/core/README.md): API client usage, response shape, EU detection, browser signals, RUM telemetry
- [React README](https://github.com/netloc8/netloc8-js/blob/main/packages/react/README.md): Provider setup, useGeo() hook, GeoGate component, loading states
- [Next.js README](https://github.com/netloc8/netloc8-js/blob/main/packages/nextjs/README.md): Proxy setup, Server Components, SSR geo data, locale redirects
- [Changelog](https://github.com/netloc8/netloc8-js/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Version history and breaking changes

## Key Concepts

- **Direct mode**: Browser calls the NetLoc8 edge API using a publishable key (pk_). Fastest option for SPAs.
- **Proxy mode**: Server resolves geo data before rendering. Best for SEO and first-paint accuracy.
- **GeoGate**: React component for conditional rendering by country, region, city, or EU membership.
- **isEU()**: Helper function to check EU membership for GDPR compliance. Use country/region fields for CCPA.
- **Cookie caching**: After first lookup, geo data is cached in __netloc8 cookie. Subsequent visits use cached data.
- **Browser timezone reconciliation**: IP-based timezone on first request, browser-confirmed on hydration.

## Quick Start

Install: `bun add @netloc8/nextjs` (or `@netloc8/react` or `@netloc8/core`)

Simplest usage (React/Next.js):
```tsx
<NetLoc8Provider apiKey="pk_...">
    <App />
</NetLoc8Provider>
```

Access geo data:
```tsx
const { geo, isLoading, error } = useGeo();
geo.location?.country?.code;  // "US"
geo.location?.city;           // "Mountain View"
geo.location?.timezone;       // "America/Los_Angeles"
```

Conditional rendering:
```tsx
<GeoGate eu={true}>
    <CookieConsentBanner />
</GeoGate>
```
